title: Chat Ticket Progress Event
description: Progress event payload for a Brain chat linked to a planning work item (task/epic/objective/initiative/portfolio/roadmap/spec). Sent whenever a relevant state change occurs.

kind.description: The type of work item (identifies the ticket tier).

ref.description: The identifier for this work item (task id as text, or UUID for strategy tiers)

label.description: Display title/name of the work item.

status.description: Current raw status string of the work item.

progressPct.description: Completion percentage 0–100. Metric type: 0 = not started, 1–99 = in progress, 100 = complete OR terminal-status signal. The Book rule: progressPct=100 MUST be emitted only once, after ALL processing steps are confirmed complete and NO further progress updates follow.

done.description: Number of completed sub-items (leaf tasks counted as 1 each, or KRs for objectives). Only relevant for container tiers.

total.description: Total number of sub-items to complete (leaf tasks for epic, key results for objective). Only relevant for container tiers.

exists.description: True if the referenced ticket exists in the tenant; false if it was deleted or cross-tenant.
